label: 点生矩形
description: 将网格中的非零点扩展为指定宽高的矩形掩码区域，矩形掩码值与点的掩码值相同，支持多点。
description-en: Expands each non-zero point in the grid into a rectangle mask of the specified width and height, preserving the point's mask value. Supports multiple points.
icon: 扁平插画风格小图标。一个深色网格上有一个亮蓝色小圆点，圆点向外扩展出一个浅蓝色矩形区域，表示点扩展为矩形的过程，主色蓝白两种。

inputs.name: grid
inputs.label: 输入网格
inputs.description: 含点的源网格，非零格视为点，零格为空白
inputs.description-en: Source grid with points; non-zero cells are treated as points, zero cells as empty.

inputs.name: width
inputs.label: 矩形宽度
inputs.description: 每个点扩展出的矩形列数
inputs.description-en: Number of columns for each expanded rectangle.

inputs.name: height
inputs.label: 矩形高度
inputs.description: 每个点扩展出的矩形行数
inputs.description-en: Number of rows for each expanded rectangle.

outputs.name: outputGrid
outputs.label: 输出网格
outputs.description: 每个点扩展为矩形后的网格，矩形掩码值与原点相同
outputs.description-en: Grid with each point expanded into a rectangle using the same mask value.
